pages.raw_text:
Governor George Curry Of New
Mexico writes from Santa Fee to
R. Insinger. chairman Of the local
board of control of the national
irrigation congress, which will
meet in Spokane August to IA,
that he hopes to be present with
members of his staff, adding that
there is no doubt but strong dele
cation will go to Spokane from his
territory.


United States Senator George
Sutherland of Utah writes from
Washington, d. c., that the state
of Utah will undoubtedly send a
representative delegation to SpO-
kane. United States Senator Reed
Smoot of Utah writes from Wash
ington. ID. c.:


81 am fully convinced of the
great amount of good which is be-
ing accomplished by these con-
crosses, and l bespeak for the
seventeenth congress most sue
cessful gathering at Spokane"
